message.body: JugglingElectrons is now live! Streaming I Wanna Be the Guy: 1st time fan - NANG
3 minutes of ADs starting now. Chill out and I will be back after the sponsors!
You might need to adjust the green sensitivity
can you turn game volume up?
just don’t wanna hit it by accident
yeah controlling blood pressure and shit is important
I miss the index and middle
actually I was using ring and index on left
and then shift with index/middle together for jump
or index shift jump and middle x shoot
I was using left handed keyboard, so numpad and arrows were on left
so I was using 4 and 6 as left and right
and left shift and x with right hand
did yalllook at that guide I posed
you could do wasd or some shit
then R won’t be far away
but this game lets you change the controls
maybe if you stutter to the right as you’re falling
just a single pause to the right
like if you walk off and hold right you’ll hit the spike
you just gotta wait a tiny bit after the double jump to hit right
yeah you get the idea tho
what’s the lightest jump you can do
try to make yourself go as low as possible while still using double jump
which is where the pun comes from in the dialogue
yeah neutral double jump for speed control
I think your toe can touch the death block?
I forget when you actually die
there might be a full second jump spot
yeah kinda adjust on the fly based on left right position in the block
that at least normalizes your speed
if you’re doing toe line ups you gotta press both direction and jump on same frame
a new NANG playthrough is cool to see in 2026 :)
I mean don’t gotta but it helps
This was my first fangame ever too. This is about as hard as you want to go for your first fangame
crimson needle WAY too hard for 1st
he saw me playing it and wanted to try
and I’m like hmmm maybe just play nang first
oh nice I'm on floor 80 in the 3rd one getting absolutely clobbered
3 minutes of ADs starting now. Chill out and I will be back after the sponsors!
as far as pressing a key to jump
I like shift as jump tho
it’s a big ass jump button
yeah my thumbs aren’t nearly as dynamic I feel
I was gonna suggest that actually
I’ve also heard people use up arrow as jump
if you’re gonna get all the way to the edge you gotta hit jump and right on the same frame
you did that on dark souls too
yeah it’s basically a series of set ups
and the learning the rhythm for each jump
once I saw it I was like classic
Speaking of fans. A friend procured onlyfirefans.org today for shenanigans
We spin fire fans and plan to make dumb knock off pics of OF styled photos but sfw
I just got back from stilts and juggling practice
maybe think about the top spike instead
@laser_los we like to create cacophony around here lol
@sumfl0w3r I love it.  I make so many jokes about getting high
8 bit man are midnight is a vibe lol
what’s the plan on that last jump
*after not are.  Phone keyboard is trash lol
just gotta get used to common jump heights
and then you put them together
trust the process, trust the process, trust the process… thats what I’m telling myself
i just got done dyeing a hoodie for someone. they wanted ocean beach vibes. trying to make specific stuff kinda stresses me out
because im usually doing something I haven’t done before and am relying in instinct
like they want a beach on it?
like, waves crashing onto a beach was the vibes i got
I love that your levels are nice and audible! GG <3
my whole stream had audio glitches, it was depressing lol
did u see those Prototype color Analogue 3D and controllers?
I think you want the second one
3 minutes of ADs starting now. Chill out and I will be back after the sponsors!
this is about getting comfy with dipping between the 2 spikes
start the jump closer to the spike
lmao oh I thought you meant your stance
this is basically a rhythm game
if you’re holding jump inside a platform you’ll get sucked up
it’s like a third jump that wants to snap to the top of the platform
you wanna let go of jump as you snap to the floor
you’ll prolly know when it switches
i started with controller I think actually
yeah I had to have my hands in my peripheral
so I could hear the rhythm
Have a great rest of your day! seryboLove Don't forget to stay hydrated and take care of yourself! seryboLove
huge SHOUTOUT to SGC64; they were last seen playing Like a Dragon: Pirate Yakuza in Hawaii at Twitch.tv/SGC64
JugglingElectrons has sent the raid over to SGC64! Join us over at https://twitch.tv/sgc64 and show some love! seryboLove seryboArrive
